sutta: the buddha said monks possessed of 4 qualities the foolish sinful inauthentic man carries about with him an uprooted lifeless self is blameworthy is censured by the intelligent and begets much demerit what for without investigation or scrutiny he speaks in praise of what deserves not praise likewise he speaks in this praise of that deserving praise without investigation or scrutiny he shows appreciation where there should be none likewise when appreciation should be shown he shows displeasure these are the 4 qualities but monks possessed of 4 qualities the wise virtuous authentic man carries about with himself not uprooted not lifeless is not blameworthy is not censured by the intelligence and begets much to marry and gets much married what for after investigation of scrutiny he speaks in praise of that deserving praise likewise he speaks in displays of that deserving disgrace after investigation of scrutiny he shows appreciation for that deserving appreciation likewise he shows this pleasure for that deserving this pleasure these are the 4
commentary: so here the buddha is saying that when we praise or we speak of anybody or anything we should be careful we should investigate and scrutinize before we make some comment like that especially if it is about certain people [Music] especially if they are virtuous and we speak ill and that would create a lot of the marriage for us that's why we have to be very careful the buddha said now in 1 of the sutas that whenever we are about to do anything with intention before that means creating karma before we do it we must be careful and ask ourselves whether that action is going to lead to the harm of ourselves or to others if it is going to lead to the harm of the self or others we should not do it if it is going to lead to the benefit of the self others then we can do it so we have to consider before we act and then during our action itself again we should consider and even after our actions again we should consider reflect on whatever actions we have done whether it created any harm any suffering to anybody else or to ourselves or whether it benefited so we have to be [Music] careful of our actions
